__prompts__.welcome_message:
------------------------
	Welcome to Raptor! 🚀
	Values shown in brackets are the default options.
	Set organisation_name and project_name for Devops: https://dev.azure.com/ORGANISATION_NAME/PROJECT_NAME or 
	project_name for Github: https://pypi.org/p/PROJECT_NAME
__prompts__.additional_prompts: Are you using Azure DevOps or Github?
